title: Pixelmon Reforged Gen 9 Better Sprites
description: Ever felt like the gen 9 sprites are way too ugly and rushed looking? Here's a fix for you!
body:
This is a texture pack for Pixelmon that changes the sprites of all gen 9 mons to a more detailed, better looking and easier to look at version. This is aimed for the people who have been wishing for better gen 9 sprites ever since they got released.

 

The sprites used here are all made by Ezerart and edited / adjusted by fapdos. Texture pack made by fapdos with the full permission of Ezerart. You can enjoy this texture pack without any risk.

 

Click here to download Pixelmon.

 

I allow servers to use this pack if they want to. This is free to use for everyone.
